mapper.select:
SELECT rr.reservation_id AS reservationId, rr.user_account_id AS userAccountId, rr.trainer_account_id AS trainerAccountId, rr.status, rr.pay_type AS payType, rr.counts, rr.base_fee_snapshot AS baseFeeSnapshot, rr.price_snapshot AS priceSnapshot, rr.total_price_snapshot AS totalPriceSnapshot, rr.created_at AS createdAt,
rb.slot_date AS slotDate, rb.reservation_start_time AS reservationStartTime, rb.reservation_end_time AS reservationEndTime, rb.room_id AS roomId, rb.user_nickname AS userNickname, rb.user_handle AS userHandle, rb.user_hati_code AS userHatiCode, rb.trainer_nickname AS trainerNickname, rb.trainer_handle AS trainerHandle, rb.trainer_hati_code AS trainerHatiCode,
vr.center_id AS centerId, vr.center_name AS centerName, vr.category,
CASE WHEN cr.center_id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS hasReview
FROM room_reservation rr JOIN vw_reservation_base rb ON rr.reservation_id = rb.reservation_id JOIN vw_rooms vr ON rb.room_id = vr.room_id LEFT JOIN centers_reviews cr ON vr.center_id = cr.center_id AND rr.user_account_id = cr.account_id
WHERE rr.user_account_id = #{accountId}
ORDER BY rr.created_at DESC

SELECT rr.reservation_id AS reservationId, rr.user_account_id AS userAccountId, rr.trainer_account_id AS trainerAccountId, rr.status, rr.pay_type AS payType, rr.counts, rr.base_fee_snapshot AS baseFeeSnapshot, rr.price_snapshot AS priceSnapshot, rr.total_price_snapshot AS totalPriceSnapshot, rr.created_at AS createdAt,
rb.slot_date AS slotDate, rb.reservation_start_time AS reservationStartTime, rb.reservation_end_time AS reservationEndTime, rb.room_id AS roomId, rb.user_nickname AS userNickname, rb.user_handle AS userHandle, rb.user_hati_code AS userHatiCode, rb.trainer_nickname AS trainerNickname, rb.trainer_handle AS trainerHandle, rb.trainer_hati_code AS trainerHatiCode,
vr.center_id AS centerId, vr.center_name AS centerName, vr.category,
CASE WHEN cr.center_id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS hasReview
FROM room_reservation rr JOIN vw_reservation_base rb ON rr.reservation_id = rb.reservation_id JOIN vw_rooms vr ON rb.room_id = vr.room_id LEFT JOIN centers_reviews cr ON vr.center_id = cr.center_id AND rr.user_account_id = cr.account_id
WHERE rr.user_account_id = #{accountId} AND rr.status = #{status}
ORDER BY rr.created_at DESC

SELECT rr.reservation_id AS reservationId, rr.user_account_id AS userAccountId, rr.trainer_account_id AS trainerAccountId, rr.status, rr.pay_type AS payType, rr.counts, rr.base_fee_snapshot AS baseFeeSnapshot, rr.price_snapshot AS priceSnapshot, rr.total_price_snapshot AS totalPriceSnapshot, rr.created_at AS createdAt,
rb.slot_date AS slotDate, rb.reservation_start_time AS reservationStartTime, rb.reservation_end_time AS reservationEndTime, rb.room_id AS roomId, rb.user_nickname AS userNickname, rb.user_handle AS userHandle, rb.user_hati_code AS userHatiCode, rb.trainer_nickname AS trainerNickname, rb.trainer_handle AS trainerHandle, rb.trainer_hati_code AS trainerHatiCode,
vr.center_id AS centerId, vr.center_name AS centerName, vr.category,
CASE WHEN cr.center_id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS hasReview
FROM room_reservation rr JOIN vw_reservation_base rb ON rr.reservation_id = rb.reservation_id JOIN vw_rooms vr ON rb.room_id = vr.room_id LEFT JOIN centers_reviews cr ON vr.center_id = cr.center_id AND rr.user_account_id = cr.account_id
WHERE rr.reservation_id = #{reservationId}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM room_reservation rr JOIN vw_reservation_time_range tr ON rr.reservation_id = tr.reservation_id JOIN vw_rooms vr ON tr.room_id = vr.room_id WHERE rr.user_account_id = #{accountId} AND vr.center_id = #{centerId} AND rr.status = 'COMPLETED'
mapper.update: UPDATE room_reservation SET status = 'CANCELLED' WHERE reservation_id = #{reservationId} AND status IN ('RESERVED', 'PENDING')
mapper.select: SELECT rr.reservation_id AS reservationId, vr.center_name AS centerName, c.center_region AS centerRegion, rb.slot_date AS slotDate, rb.reservation_start_time AS reservationStartTime, rb.reservation_end_time AS reservationEndTime FROM room_reservation rr JOIN vw_reservation_base rb ON rr.reservation_id = rb.reservation_id JOIN vw_rooms vr ON rb.room_id = vr.room_id JOIN centers c ON vr.center_id = c.center_id WHERE rr.user_account_id = #{accountId} AND TRUNC(rb.slot_date) = TRUNC(SYSDATE) AND rr.status = 'RESERVED' AND ROWNUM = 1 ORDER BY rb.reservation_start_time ASC
